CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value) VALUES (2, 'Virtuoso Database');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value) VALUES (3, 'SHA1 Test');
SELECT id, bif:sha1(value) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(CONCAT(value, ' Extra String')) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE id = 1), 'Default Value')) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data WHERE id = 2;
SELECT A.id, bif:sha1(B.value) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data A JOIN test_data B ON A.id = B.id WHERE A.value != B.value;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(value) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data WHERE LENGTH(value) < 10;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(value) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value LIKE '%Test%');
UPDATE test_data SET value = bif:sha1(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(value) AS sha1_hash FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data) AS subquery;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(NULLIF(value, '')) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data;
SELECT id, bif:sha1(TRIM(value)) AS sha1_hash FROM test_data WHERE id > 1;
SELECT A.id, bif:sha1(CONCAT(A.value, B.value)) AS sha1_combined_hash FROM test_data A, test_data B WHERE A.id <> B.id;
